features.name: threat-intelligence
features.description: Threat intelligence ingestion, parsing, and automated/manual investigation workflows that correlate threat data into actionable security investigations. (merged: threat_feed_parsers, investigation)

flows.name: triage-detections
flows.description: User views, filters, and updates the status or AI assessment of security detections.

flows.name: run-investigation
flows.description: User creates, streams, forks, and reviews AI-driven investigations linked to detections.

flows.name: configure-autonomous-investigation
flows.description: User views and updates SOC0 autonomous investigation settings to control automated investigation behaviour.

flows.name: manage-threat-feeds
flows.description: User adds, deletes, polls, and imports suggested threat intelligence feeds used for hunt execution.

flows.name: hunt-from-threat-article
flows.description: User initiates a threat hunt seeded from an external threat-intelligence article.

flows.name: add-threat-feed-flow
flows.description: User adds a new threat intelligence feed by providing a URL and letting the system detect its format.

flows.name: import-suggested-feeds-flow
flows.description: User browses the suggested feeds catalog and imports one or more curated feeds in bulk.

flows.name: poll-feed-now-flow
flows.description: User manually triggers an immediate poll of a threat feed to fetch the latest indicators.

flows.name: hunt-from-article-flow
flows.description: User pastes a threat intelligence article URL and the system extracts IOCs to run a hunt.

flows.name: delete-threat-feed-flow
flows.description: User removes a threat feed from the active feed list, stopping future polling.

flows.name: manage-investigations-flow
flows.description: List, retrieve, create, and run custom threat investigations.

features.name: chat
features.description: AI-powered conversational interface where users send messages, receive structured responses (charts, tables, detector blocks, flow diagrams), manage conversation history, and generate reports or save outputs from chat sessions.

flows.name: send-chat-message
flows.description: User sends a message in a conversation and receives a streaming AI response with rich content blocks.

flows.name: start-conversation
flows.description: User creates a new conversation session to begin interacting with the AI assistant.

flows.name: manage-conversation
flows.description: User renames or deletes an existing conversation, or retrieves its message history.

flows.name: generate-report-from-conversation
flows.description: User triggers report generation from the current chat conversation and is navigated to the resulting report.

flows.name: browse-and-act-on-prompt-suggestions
flows.description: User views AI-generated prompt suggestions and either converts one into a scheduled prompt or dismisses it.

flows.name: upload-file-to-chat
flows.description: User drags and drops or selects a file to attach to a chat message for AI analysis.

flows.name: create-report-flow
flows.description: User creates a new report, optionally seeding it from a chat conversation or investigation summary.

flows.name: export-report-flow
flows.description: User exports a report as PDF or DOCX for distribution outside the platform.

flows.name: fork-shared-conversation-flow
flows.description: User forks a shared conversation into their own workspace to continue the investigation.

flows.name: chat-messaging-flow
flows.description: Core chat interaction including message sending, streaming, follow-ups, and message control.

flows.name: manage-outputs-flow
flows.description: Output template and execution retrieval for chat-generated content.

flows.name: manage-reports-flow
flows.description: Create, update, delete, share, and export security reports with section-level editing.

flows.name: share-content-flow
flows.description: Share conversations and reports via tokens with fork and access control.

features.name: policy
features.description: AI-assisted security policy generation and rule management, allowing users to generate policy documents, manage rule sets, and track generation history.

flows.name: generate-policy
flows.description: User triggers AI-driven analysis of organizational behavior to generate a versioned set of policy rules.

flows.name: view-and-search-policy-rules
flows.description: User browses, filters, and searches existing policy rules on the Policy page.

flows.name: accept-policy-rule-from-chat
flows.description: User accepts a suggested policy rule from the chat widget, which writes it into the behavioral profile.

flows.name: search-policy-for-agent
flows.description: Agent tool queries the behavioral policy profile to inform security analysis decisions.

flows.name: delete-policy-generations
flows.description: User deletes all policy generations and their associated rules for their organization.

features.name: agent-settings
features.description: Configuration of AI agent behavior including enabling/disabling tools, managing personal and org-level system prompts, and setting user context items that persist across sessions.

flows.name: manage-context-items
flows.description: User creates, edits, pins, and deletes personal context items that are injected into agent sessions.

flows.name: manage-personal-prompts
flows.description: User creates, edits, enables/disables, and deletes personal prompts that are injected into their chat sessions.

flows.name: manage-org-prompts
flows.description: Org admin upserts a shared org-level prompt that is injected into all users' chat sessions and investigations.

flows.name: configure-external-tools
flows.description: Org admin enables or disables external intelligence tools (NVD, OTX) available to all agents and investigations.

features.name: dashboard-widgets
features.description: Dashboard widget management and scheduled automation that surfaces recurring AI-driven query results as persistent visual components. (merged: widget_library, schedules)

flows.name: create-and-manage-dashboard
flows.description: User creates, views, updates, or deletes a personal or shared dashboard.

flows.name: add-refresh-widget
flows.description: User adds a widget to a dashboard and triggers a data refresh against BigQuery.

flows.name: browse-save-widget-library
flows.description: User browses the widget library, saves a new widget, and validates or previews its underlying query.

flows.name: schedule-widget-prompt
flows.description: User creates, edits, or manually runs a scheduled prompt that auto-populates dashboard widgets on a recurring basis.

flows.name: view-home-dashboard
flows.description: User lands on the home page where the default dashboard and its widgets are loaded and displayed.

flows.name: manage-schedules-page
flows.description: User views, triggers, and inspects execution history for all configured widget-refresh schedules.

flows.name: save-widget-to-library
flows.description: User saves a chart or widget block produced in chat to the shared widget library.

flows.name: create-dashboard-flow
flows.description: User creates a new named dashboard and begins adding widgets to it.

flows.name: add-widget-to-dashboard-flow
flows.description: User picks a saved widget from the library and adds it to a dashboard layout.

flows.name: duplicate-dashboard-flow
flows.description: User duplicates an existing dashboard to use it as a template for a new view.

flows.name: save-widget-to-library-flow
flows.description: User saves a query-backed visualization as a reusable widget in the widget library.

flows.name: validate-widget-query-flow
flows.description: User validates a custom query before saving it as a widget to ensure it returns valid results.

flows.name: create-api-key
flows.description: User creates a new named API key with a chosen expiration period.

flows.name: reveal-and-copy-api-key
flows.description: User views and copies the newly created secret key before it is hidden forever.

flows.name: create-api-key-flow
flows.description: User creates a new API key for programmatic access and copies the revealed secret.

flows.name: revoke-api-key-flow
flows.description: User revokes an existing API key to prevent further programmatic access.

flows.name: manage-api-keys-flow
flows.description: API key lifecycle management including deletion.

features.name: detectors
features.description: Full lifecycle management of security detectors: creating, editing, approving, running, versioning, suppressing findings, and deploying native rules to connected EDR platforms.

flows.name: browse-and-filter-detectors
flows.description: User views the full detector list and filters by status, severity, data source, or search term.

flows.name: create-detector
flows.description: User creates a new detector, triggering validation and quality scoring.

flows.name: edit-detector
flows.description: User edits an existing detector's logic, schedule, or metadata via the edit form.

flows.name: review-and-approve-detector
flows.description: User (or bulk action) approves or rejects one or more pending detector drafts to put them into production.

flows.name: run-detector-now
flows.description: User manually triggers an immediate detector execution with a chosen lookback window and reviews resulting findings.

flows.name: view-detector-detail
flows.description: User opens a detector's detail page to inspect its logic, version history, findings, runs, and quality scorecard.

flows.name: manage-edr-deployments
flows.description: User deploys, removes, or syncs a detector to a native EDR platform (CrowdStrike, Defender, SentinelOne, Cortex) and previews drift.

flows.name: generate-detector-suggestions
flows.description: User requests AI-generated detector suggestions based on their environment and threat coverage gaps.

flows.name: browse-findings-flow
flows.description: User opens the findings page, browses the list, and filters by severity or verdict.

flows.name: view-finding-detail-flow
flows.description: User opens a finding detail page to review evidence, context, and linked detector.

flows.name: set-finding-verdict-flow
flows.description: User marks a finding as true positive, false positive, or benign using the verdict picker.

flows.name: bulk-verdict-flow
flows.description: User selects multiple findings and applies a verdict in bulk.

flows.name: suppress-unsuppress-finding-flow
flows.description: User creates a suppression rule from a finding or removes an existing suppression to re-enable alerting.

flows.name: triage-findings-with-verdict
flows.description: Analyst reviews security findings on the Findings page and assigns a verdict (true positive, false positive, etc.) individually or in bulk.

flows.name: manage-findings-flow
flows.description: Finding retrieval, verdict assignment, bulk operations, and suppression rule management.

features.name: usage-billing
features.description: Token usage monitoring and credit management for the organization, showing per-member consumption and allowing admins to set credit limits.

flows.name: view-org-token-usage
flows.description: User views aggregated token usage stats broken down by member and API key for their organization.

flows.name: sync-org-member-names
flows.description: Client syncs current org member display names and emails so removed members still appear correctly on the usage page.

flows.name: set-org-credits
flows.description: A port0 employee updates the token credit balance for an organization.

flows.name: browse-labels
flows.description: User browses all labels in tree or table view, filtered by type and search query.

flows.name: create-label
flows.description: User opens the label form dialog and creates a new user-defined label with name, type, color, icon, and optional auto-assign conditions.

flows.name: edit-label
flows.description: User selects an existing label and updates its name, type, color, icon, values, or conditions via the form dialog.

flows.name: inspect-label-profile
flows.description: User clicks a label row to open the side drawer showing full label metadata, values, and associated entities.

flows.name: manage-labels-flow
flows.description: User creates, edits, or deletes labels and assigns them to entities from the labels management page.

flows.name: browse-labels-tree-flow
flows.description: User navigates the hierarchical label tree view to explore label categories and their associated entities.

flows.name: label-management-flow
flows.description: Retrieve label assignments and metadata for entities from BigQuery.

features.name: insights
features.description: AI-driven security posture scoring, environment intelligence, and focus-based analysis runs that surface wins, gaps, and top recommended actions for the organization.

flows.name: view-insights-dashboard
flows.description: User views the full insights dashboard including posture score, environment intelligence, wins/gaps, and open insights list filtered by pillar.

flows.name: browse-and-review-insights
flows.description: User lists, filters, and reads individual insights by pillar or focus, including viewing unread counts and marking insights as viewed.

flows.name: view-security-posture
flows.description: User views the organisation's posture score, sub-scores, top recommended actions, and what's-new highlights.

flows.name: view-environment-intelligence
flows.description: User views a snapshot of their AI-tool environment landscape to understand coverage and risk surface.

flows.name: create-and-manage-insight-focus
flows.description: User creates a custom insight focus with a prompt and schedule, updates an existing focus, and browses the focus catalogue.

flows.name: trigger-focus-run
flows.description: User manually triggers an AI agent run for a specific focus and reviews its run history.

flows.name: act-on-insight
flows.description: User submits feedback on an insight, dismisses it, or bulk-deletes all insights for their organisation.

flows.name: view-home-dashboard-flow
flows.description: User lands on the home page and sees an overview of critical detections, anomalies, and threat funnel metrics.

flows.name: home-dashboard-insights-flow
flows.description: Aggregate security, compliance, and threat intelligence metrics for the home dashboard display.

flows.name: home-dashboard-flow
flows.description: Aggregates security metrics and threat intelligence for the home dashboard including activity, detections, assets, and threat snapshots.

flows.name: insights-display-flow
flows.description: Retrieves and displays metadata for insights pillars, severity levels, and detection engines.

flows.name: create-and-execute-task
flows.description: User submits a prompt to create a task, which is immediately queued for background execution by the AI agent.

flows.name: list-tasks
flows.description: User views all tasks (optionally filtered by status) on the Tasks dashboard.

flows.name: delete-task
flows.description: User removes a task from the list via the delete action on the Tasks page.

features.name: inventory
features.description: Asset inventory management providing a searchable, filterable, and groupable table of all entities (machines, users, etc.) with risk scoring and bulk actions.

flows.name: browse-filter-inventory
flows.description: User browses the entity inventory, switching tabs, filtering by integration, toggling inactive entities, and searching by free text.

flows.name: inspect-entity-profile
flows.description: User clicks an entity row to open its profile drawer for detailed inspection.

flows.name: group-and-sort-entities
flows.description: User groups the entity list by a label key and sorts grouped or flat results by a chosen field and direction.

flows.name: bulk-select-and-act-on-entities
flows.description: User selects multiple entities and performs bulk actions such as viewing them in the network graph or adding them to a label.

flows.name: customize-table-columns
flows.description: User toggles column visibility in the entity table to show or hide specific data fields.

features.name: knowledge
features.description: Personal and organizational knowledge base for grounding AI responses, supporting file uploads, manual entries, RAG retrieval, and org-level takeaway extraction from conversations.

flows.name: browse-knowledge-entries
flows.description: User views all org knowledge entries grouped by section on the Knowledge page.

flows.name: add-knowledge-entry
flows.description: User creates a new knowledge entry by typing content or uploading a file via the Add Knowledge dialog.

flows.name: upload-knowledge-file
flows.description: User uploads a PDF, DOCX, or TXT file as a new org knowledge entry.

flows.name: edit-knowledge-entry
flows.description: User updates the metadata or content of an existing knowledge entry.

flows.name: delete-knowledge-entry
flows.description: User removes a knowledge entry (and optionally its associated file) from the organisation.

flows.name: set-personal-knowledge-preference
flows.description: User toggles individual knowledge entries on or off for their own chat context via per-user preferences.

flows.name: manage-org-knowledge-flow
flows.description: Organization knowledge base management including entry CRUD, file uploads, and user preferences.

flows.name: knowledge-sections-flow
flows.description: Manages knowledge base sections including user-addable sections and section metadata.

features.name: network-security
features.description: Network traffic analysis and entity graph exploration with a SQL-backed query engine, traffic graph visualization, and entity profile drawers for NDR investigations.

flows.name: search-network-entities
flows.description: User performs a free-text search across network entity columns to discover matching field-value pairs.

flows.name: filter-traffic-with-query-engine
flows.description: User builds structured filter rules that are compiled to SQL and encoded into URL parameters to query network traffic data.

flows.name: inspect-entity-profile
flows.description: User clicks a graph node to open a slide-in drawer showing detailed profile information for a network entity.

flows.name: suggest-filter-values
flows.description: User types into a filter field and receives live value suggestions sourced from enum definitions or BigQuery queries.

flows.name: query-entities-flow
flows.description: Fetch and analyze network entities with risk scoring and aggregation.

flows.name: traffic-graph-flow
flows.description: Retrieve network traffic graph data and entity organizational labels for visualization.

flows.name: ndr-table-query-flow
flows.description: Fetch tabular network data for display and analysis.

features.name: documentation
features.description: Documentation, tutorials, examples, and marketing pages.

features.name: cases
features.description: Security case management for grouping signals, tracking remediation, adding timeline events, and collaborating on incident response.

flows.name: browse-and-filter-cases
flows.description: User views the paginated cases list and filters by severity, status, verdict, detector, or free-text search.

flows.name: open-case-detail
flows.description: User clicks a case row to view its full detail page including sidebar metadata, comments, activity, and tabbed sub-sections.

flows.name: investigate-case-signals
flows.description: User opens the signal detail slide-over panel from within a case to inspect an individual correlated signal.

flows.name: review-case-timeline
flows.description: User reads the chronological attack timeline reconstructed for a case and clicks timeline events to drill into linked signals.

flows.name: remediate-case
flows.description: User works through the respond-and-remediate checklist, marking remediation, follow-on, and detection-tuning items as done.

flows.name: update-case-verdict
flows.description: User sets or changes the verdict and severity on a case, triggering a PATCH to the case endpoint.

flows.name: add-case-comment
flows.description: User posts a comment on a case, which is stored and appended to the case activity log.

features.name: compliance
features.description: Compliance framework management allowing users to assess controls, track posture across frameworks (e.g., SOC2, ISO27001), create custom controls, and update assessment status.

flows.name: browse-compliance-frameworks
flows.description: User views all available compliance frameworks with progress summaries and drills into a single framework to see its full control list.

flows.name: assess-compliance-control
flows.description: User sets the assessment status (e.g. compliant, in-progress) and attaches evidence notes to a specific control within a framework.

flows.name: add-custom-control
flows.description: User creates a new org-scoped custom control and optionally edits or deletes it later.

flows.name: customise-builtin-control
flows.description: User overrides the title or description of a built-in framework control so the change is scoped to their organisation without affecting other orgs.

features.name: integrations
features.description: Connect and manage third-party security tool integrations (EDR, cloud, network) through a catalog-driven setup wizard with per-provider configuration dialogs.

flows.name: setup-integration-flow
flows.description: User selects an integration, follows the setup wizard steps, and completes provider-specific configuration.

flows.name: request-integration-flow
flows.description: Integration request submission and management.

flows.name: manage-integrations-flow
flows.description: Full lifecycle management of security tool integrations including creation, retrieval, deletion, and consent workflows.

flows.name: integration-name-lookup-flow
flows.description: Utility functions for resolving integration names by ID and type.

compact_features.name: chat
compact_features.description: AI-powered conversational interface where users send messages, receive structured responses (charts, tables, detector blocks, flow diagrams), manage conversation history, and generate reports or save outputs from chat sessions.

flows.name: start-conversation
flows.description: User creates a new conversation session to begin interacting with the AI assistant.

flows.name: manage-conversation
flows.description: User renames or deletes an existing conversation, or retrieves its message history.

flows.name: generate-report-from-conversation
flows.description: User triggers report generation from the current chat conversation and is navigated to the resulting report.

flows.name: browse-and-act-on-prompt-suggestions
flows.description: User views AI-generated prompt suggestions and either converts one into a scheduled prompt or dismisses it.

flows.name: upload-file-to-chat
flows.description: User drags and drops or selects a file to attach to a chat message for AI analysis.

flows.name: create-report-flow
flows.description: User creates a new report, optionally seeding it from a chat conversation or investigation summary.

flows.name: export-report-flow
flows.description: User exports a report as PDF or DOCX for distribution outside the platform.

flows.name: fork-shared-conversation-flow
flows.description: User forks a shared conversation into their own workspace to continue the investigation.

flows.name: chat-messaging-flow
flows.description: Core chat interaction including message sending, streaming, follow-ups, and message control.

flows.name: manage-outputs-flow
flows.description: Output template and execution retrieval for chat-generated content.

flows.name: manage-reports-flow
flows.description: Create, update, delete, share, and export security reports with section-level editing.

flows.name: share-content-flow
flows.description: Share conversations and reports via tokens with fork and access control.

flows.name: inspect-entity-profile

flows.name: bulk-select-and-act-on-entities

flows.name: customize-table-columns

compact_features.name: knowledge

flows.name: browse-knowledge-entries
flows.description: User views all org knowledge entries grouped by section on the Knowledge page.

flows.name: add-knowledge-entry
flows.description: User creates a new knowledge entry by typing content or uploading a file via the Add Knowledge dialog.

flows.name: upload-knowledge-file
flows.description: User uploads a PDF, DOCX, or TXT file as a new org knowledge entry.

flows.name: edit-knowledge-entry
flows.description: User updates the metadata or content of an existing knowledge entry.

flows.name: delete-knowledge-entry
flows.description: User removes a knowledge entry (and optionally its associated file) from the organisation.

flows.name: set-personal-knowledge-preference
flows.description: User toggles individual knowledge entries on or off for their own chat context via per-user preferences.

flows.name: manage-org-knowledge-flow
flows.description: Organization knowledge base management including entry CRUD, file uploads, and user preferences.

flows.name: knowledge-sections-flow
flows.description: Manages knowledge base sections including user-addable sections and section metadata.

flows.name: create-api-key
flows.description: User creates a new named API key with a chosen expiration period.

flows.name: reveal-and-copy-api-key
flows.description: User views and copies the newly created secret key before it is hidden forever.

flows.name: create-api-key-flow
flows.description: User creates a new API key for programmatic access and copies the revealed secret.

flows.name: revoke-api-key-flow
flows.description: User revokes an existing API key to prevent further programmatic access.

flows.name: manage-api-keys-flow
flows.description: API key lifecycle management including deletion.

compact_features.name: agent-settings
compact_features.description: Configuration of AI agent behavior including enabling/disabling tools, managing personal and org-level system prompts, and setting user context items that persist across sessions.

flows.name: manage-context-items
flows.description: User creates, edits, pins, and deletes personal context items that are injected into agent sessions.

flows.name: manage-personal-prompts
flows.description: User creates, edits, enables/disables, and deletes personal prompts that are injected into their chat sessions.

flows.name: manage-org-prompts
flows.description: Org admin upserts a shared org-level prompt that is injected into all users' chat sessions and investigations.

flows.name: configure-external-tools
flows.description: Org admin enables or disables external intelligence tools (NVD, OTX) available to all agents and investigations.

flows.name: browse-labels
flows.description: User browses all labels in tree or table view, filtered by type and search query.

flows.name: create-label
flows.description: User opens the label form dialog and creates a new user-defined label with name, type, color, icon, and optional auto-assign conditions.

flows.name: edit-label
flows.description: User selects an existing label and updates its name, type, color, icon, values, or conditions via the form dialog.

flows.name: inspect-label-profile
flows.description: User clicks a label row to open the side drawer showing full label metadata, values, and associated entities.

flows.name: manage-labels-flow
flows.description: User creates, edits, or deletes labels and assigns them to entities from the labels management page.

flows.name: browse-labels-tree-flow
flows.description: User navigates the hierarchical label tree view to explore label categories and their associated entities.

flows.name: label-management-flow
flows.description: Retrieve label assignments and metadata for entities from BigQuery.

compact_features.name: dashboard-widgets
compact_features.description: Dashboard widget management and scheduled automation that surfaces recurring AI-driven query results as persistent visual components. (merged: widget_library, schedules)

flows.name: create-and-manage-dashboard
flows.description: User creates, views, updates, or deletes a personal or shared dashboard.

flows.name: add-refresh-widget
flows.description: User adds a widget to a dashboard and triggers a data refresh against BigQuery.

flows.name: browse-save-widget-library
flows.description: User browses the widget library, saves a new widget, and validates or previews its underlying query.

flows.name: schedule-widget-prompt
flows.description: User creates, edits, or manually runs a scheduled prompt that auto-populates dashboard widgets on a recurring basis.

flows.name: view-home-dashboard
flows.description: User lands on the home page where the default dashboard and its widgets are loaded and displayed.

flows.name: manage-schedules-page
flows.description: User views, triggers, and inspects execution history for all configured widget-refresh schedules.

flows.name: save-widget-to-library
flows.description: User saves a chart or widget block produced in chat to the shared widget library.

flows.name: create-dashboard-flow
flows.description: User creates a new named dashboard and begins adding widgets to it.

flows.name: add-widget-to-dashboard-flow
flows.description: User picks a saved widget from the library and adds it to a dashboard layout.

flows.name: duplicate-dashboard-flow
flows.description: User duplicates an existing dashboard to use it as a template for a new view.

flows.name: save-widget-to-library-flow
flows.description: User saves a query-backed visualization as a reusable widget in the widget library.

flows.name: validate-widget-query-flow
flows.description: User validates a custom query before saving it as a widget to ensure it returns valid results.

compact_features.name: network-security
compact_features.description: Network traffic analysis and entity graph exploration with a SQL-backed query engine, traffic graph visualization, and entity profile drawers for NDR investigations.

flows.name: search-network-entities
flows.description: User performs a free-text search across network entity columns to discover matching field-value pairs.

flows.name: filter-traffic-with-query-engine
flows.description: User builds structured filter rules that are compiled to SQL and encoded into URL parameters to query network traffic data.

flows.name: inspect-entity-profile
flows.description: User clicks a graph node to open a slide-in drawer showing detailed profile information for a network entity.

flows.name: suggest-filter-values
flows.description: User types into a filter field and receives live value suggestions sourced from enum definitions or BigQuery queries.

flows.name: query-entities-flow
flows.description: Fetch and analyze network entities with risk scoring and aggregation.

flows.name: traffic-graph-flow
flows.description: Retrieve network traffic graph data and entity organizational labels for visualization.

flows.name: ndr-table-query-flow
flows.description: Fetch tabular network data for display and analysis.

compact_features.name: usage-billing
compact_features.description: Token usage monitoring and credit management for the organization, showing per-member consumption and allowing admins to set credit limits.

flows.name: view-org-token-usage
flows.description: User views aggregated token usage stats broken down by member and API key for their organization.

flows.name: sync-org-member-names
flows.description: Client syncs current org member display names and emails so removed members still appear correctly on the usage page.

flows.name: set-org-credits
flows.description: A port0 employee updates the token credit balance for an organization.

compact_features.name: policy
compact_features.description: AI-assisted security policy generation and rule management, allowing users to generate policy documents, manage rule sets, and track generation history.

flows.name: generate-policy
flows.description: User triggers AI-driven analysis of organizational behavior to generate a versioned set of policy rules.

flows.name: view-and-search-policy-rules
flows.description: User browses, filters, and searches existing policy rules on the Policy page.

flows.name: accept-policy-rule-from-chat
flows.description: User accepts a suggested policy rule from the chat widget, which writes it into the behavioral profile.

flows.name: search-policy-for-agent
flows.description: Agent tool queries the behavioral policy profile to inform security analysis decisions.

flows.name: delete-policy-generations
flows.description: User deletes all policy generations and their associated rules for their organization.

flows.name: browse-compliance-frameworks
flows.description: User views all available compliance frameworks with progress summaries and drills into a single framework to see its full control list.

flows.name: assess-compliance-control
flows.description: User sets the assessment status (e.g. compliant, in-progress) and attaches evidence notes to a specific control within a framework.

flows.name: add-custom-control
flows.description: User creates a new org-scoped custom control and optionally edits or deletes it later.

flows.name: customise-builtin-control
flows.description: User overrides the title or description of a built-in framework control so the change is scoped to their organisation without affecting other orgs.

compact_features.name: cases
compact_features.description: Security case management for grouping signals, tracking remediation, adding timeline events, and collaborating on incident response.

flows.name: browse-and-filter-cases
flows.description: User views the paginated cases list and filters by severity, status, verdict, detector, or free-text search.

flows.name: open-case-detail
flows.description: User clicks a case row to view its full detail page including sidebar metadata, comments, activity, and tabbed sub-sections.

flows.name: investigate-case-signals
flows.description: User opens the signal detail slide-over panel from within a case to inspect an individual correlated signal.

flows.name: review-case-timeline
flows.description: User reads the chronological attack timeline reconstructed for a case and clicks timeline events to drill into linked signals.

flows.name: remediate-case
flows.description: User works through the respond-and-remediate checklist, marking remediation, follow-on, and detection-tuning items as done.

flows.name: update-case-verdict
flows.description: User sets or changes the verdict and severity on a case, triggering a PATCH to the case endpoint.

flows.name: add-case-comment
flows.description: User posts a comment on a case, which is stored and appended to the case activity log.

flows.name: create-and-execute-task
flows.description: User submits a prompt to create a task, which is immediately queued for background execution by the AI agent.

flows.name: list-tasks
flows.description: User views all tasks (optionally filtered by status) on the Tasks dashboard.

flows.name: delete-task
flows.description: User removes a task from the list via the delete action on the Tasks page.
